scripts.test: npm run clean && NODE_OPTIONS='--loader esm-module-alias/loader' playwright test --config=playwright.config.js
scripts.test:smoketest: npm run clean && NODE_OPTIONS='--loader esm-module-alias/loader' playwright test --config=playwright.config.js --grep @smoketest
scripts.test:browserstack: npm run clean && NODE_OPTIONS='--loader esm-module-alias/loader' node_modules/.bin/browserstack-node-sdk playwright test --config=playwright.browserstack.config.js
scripts.test:local: npm run clean && NODE_OPTIONS='--loader esm-module-alias/loader' playwright test --config=playwright.config.js --grep-invert @envonly
scripts.test:local:debug: npm run clean && NODE_OPTIONS='--loader esm-module-alias/loader' DEBUG=true playwright test --config=playwright.config.js --grep-invert @envonly
scripts.test:local:grep: npm run clean && NODE_OPTIONS='--loader esm-module-alias/loader' playwright test --config=playwright.config.js --grep
scripts.test:github: npm run clean && NODE_OPTIONS='--loader esm-module-alias/loader' playwright test --config=playwright.config.js --grep-invert @envonly || touch FAILED
scripts.test:github:admin: npm run clean && NODE_OPTIONS='--loader esm-module-alias/loader' playwright test --config=playwright.config.js --grep-invert @envonly 'specs/admin/' || touch FAILED
scripts.test:github:frontend: npm run clean && NODE_OPTIONS='--loader esm-module-alias/loader' playwright test --config=playwright.config.js --grep-invert @envonly 'specs/[^/]+\.e2e\.js$' || touch FAILED
scripts.test:github:browserstack: npm run clean && NODE_OPTIONS='--loader esm-module-alias/loader' node_modules/.bin/browserstack-node-sdk playwright test --config=playwright.browserstack.config.js || touch FAILED
scripts.test:api: npm run clean && NODE_OPTIONS='--loader esm-module-alias/loader' playwright test --config=playwright.api.config.js
scripts.test:api:grep: npm run clean && NODE_OPTIONS='--loader esm-module-alias/loader' playwright test --config=playwright.api.config.js --grep
scripts.setup:husky: node -e "try { (await import('husky')).default() } catch (e) { if (e.code !== 'ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND') throw e }" --input-type module
